name: market-my-spec
description: Marketing for founders, in Claude Code. Four skills that work together: /marketing-strategy (guided 8-step strategy flow), /daily-plan (picks today's activities, manages your roster, scaffolds project-local skills), /marketing-stack (standalone infrastructure recipes: Reddit, Discord, Slack, Wix, Ghost, WordPress, Stripe, HubSpot, Postiz, Meta Ads, Facebook, Instagram, LinkedIn, Twitter/X, YouTube, Resend), /marketing-library (curated playbook plugins: marketingskills, claude-seo, anthropic-marketing, digital-marketing-pro). Stack and library co-write to marketing/infrastructure.md so daily-plan reads one source of truth.
